description_long: This object consists of two metal wheelbarrows, one stacked inside the other, with the top barrow filled with a pile of light gray gravel or stones. Both barrows have deep, slightly rusted metal trays, sturdy tubular handles with rubber grips, and a single front wheel. The handles of the lower barrow are painted yellow, while the upper barrow's handles are red. The wheels are solid and positioned at the front, with metal support legs at the rear to keep the barrows upright when stationary. The surfaces show signs of wear and dirt, indicating frequent use in construction or gardening environments.
description: Two metal wheelbarrows, one nested inside the other, with the top barrow filled with gravel and both showing signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wheelbarrows side by side, with the left barrow filled with gravel and the right barrow empty, highlighting the handles and wheels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the trays, the stacked arrangement, and the gravel load in the upper barrow.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open trays, the gravel pile in the left barrow, and the support legs at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handles, wheels, and the nested configuration of the two barrows.
attribute_handle_type: dual straight tubular handles with rubber grips
